data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm that per-user authority limits for approvals (refunds, discounts, payouts, exceptions) are implemented or validated. The linked use case outlines the need for these limits but lacks concrete evidence of their existence or functionality. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement, as the exploratory step instruction specifically calls for validation of this aspect, which was not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of per-user authority limits for approvals.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for per-user authority limits
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that per-user authority limits for approvals are correctly implemented and enforced.
